positive: A stunning, minimalist geometric illustration of a whimsical forest scene. The composition features stylized, overlapping silhouettes of various nature elements: towering, abstract geometric trees with hexagonal leaves, meandering river paths represented by flowing ribbon lines, and plump, stylized woodland animals like deer, rabbits, and foxes, rendered in highly decorative, Art Deco-inspired shapes. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep forest teal, muted ochre yellow, warm burnt sienna, and creamy off-white. The scene must be perfectly symmetrical and centered for maximum impact on apparel. Style: Clean linework, vector illustration, negative space emphasis, woodcut print aesthetic. Lighting: Flat, even studio lighting to highlight silhouettes and graphic quality. Composition: Central, highly detailed, repeatable pattern potential.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, graffiti, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photorealistic, grayscale
